sentences.arabic: فِي يَوْمِ الإِجَازَةِ بَقِيَ سُلَيْمَانُ فِي البَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Na slobodan dan Sulejman je ostao kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: On the day off Suleiman stayed at home.

sentences.translation: Ponovio je lekcije i pročitao novu knjigu.
sentences.translationEn: He reviewed his lessons and read a new book.

sentences.translation: Zapisao je važne bilješke u svesci.
sentences.translationEn: He wrote important notes in his notebook.

sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ أَنْ يَكُونَ مُسْتَعِدًّا لِلدَّرْسِ القَادِمِ.
sentences.translation: Htio je biti spreman za sljedeći čas.
sentences.translationEn: He wanted to be ready for the next lesson.
